title: Santa Ana Lawyers | Tran Law Group | Immigration Law
content:
Attorney A. Mina Tran is the foundation of our firm’s practice. She is experienced and committed to providing clients in California, the United States and throughout the world with the answers they’re looking for, information they can trust and the legal services they need at an affordable cost.
Ms. Tran is an immigrant herself and has made immigration law the focus of her practice for more than a decade.
Click on the attorney’s name below for more detailed information on her background, qualifications or career.
- Attorney Daniel X. Nguyen
clients in the United States and from around the world: (714) 702-1437
Hablamos Español — Chúng Tôi Nói Tiếng Việt
